rows.finalText: On "What is the next right step in my calling", this 3-card leans into purpose / calling, with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Sun (31), so energy, confidence, and forward movement is already in play. Sun colors your calling through confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Present turns on Birds (12), so the middle card becomes the point where the sequence can redirect. Birds colors your calling through too many voices, anxious discussion, or mental noise making it harder to hear what the path is actually asking of you. What develops in Future through Bear (15) points to strength can protect if paired with fairness, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Here, Bear emphasizes the power, resources, and protection layer of the situation. The path becomes clearest where Birds (12) meets Bear (15): a blend of dialogue and power, asking you to favor concise, clarifying dialogue while staying alert to control struggles or scarcity fear. Birds (12) is the real hinge in this spread. Birds often points to too many voices, anxious discussion, or mental noise making it harder to hear what the path is actually asking of you in your calling. Birds (12) with Bear (15) keep emphasizing a blend of dialogue and power, asking you to favor concise, clarifying dialogue while staying alert to control struggles or scarcity fear. Favor concise, clarifying dialogue so Bear (15) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
